title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at PwC India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at PwC India
jsonLd.description:
PwC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About PwC India:
PwC India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PwC India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
